bioactive.hr: aloe vera gel, probiotici i prehrambena vlakna
bioactive.en: aloe vera gel, probiotics, and dietary fiber

intro.hr: Ako je fokus na probavi, najčešće ima smisla krenuti kroz aloe veru i vlakna kao bazu dnevne rutine.
intro.en: If digestion is the focus, it often makes sense to start with aloe vera and fiber as the base of the daily routine.

bioactive.hr: aloe vera, laktoferin, vitamin D, vitamin C ili cink
bioactive.en: aloe vera, lactoferrin, vitamin D, vitamin C, or zinc

intro.hr: Za opću otpornost i sezonsku rutinu gledamo sastojke poput aloe vere, laktoferina, vitamina D, vitamina C ili cinka, bez tvrdnji o liječenju.
intro.sl: Za splošno odpornost in sezonsko rutino gledamo sestavine, kot so aloe vera, laktoferin, vitamina D in C ali cink, brez trditev o zdravljenju.
intro.en: For general resilience and seasonal routine, look at ingredients like aloe vera, lactoferrin, vitamin D, vitamin C, or zinc without making treatment claims.

bioactive.hr: vitamini B, aloe vera ili biljni izvori energije
bioactive.en: B vitamins, aloe vera, or plant-based energy support

intro.hr: Kad je glavni cilj energija, preporuka ide prema hidraciji, B vitaminima i rutini bez pretjeranih obećanja.
intro.en: When energy is the goal, recommendations should lean on hydration, B vitamins, and routine without overpromising.

intro.hr: Za pokretljivost ima smisla gledati formule sa sastojcima povezanim s mobilnošću i oporavkom svakodnevnog kretanja.
intro.en: For mobility, it makes sense to look at formulas built around ingredients associated with everyday movement support.

bioactive.hr: vlakna, proteinska podrška i metabolički sastojci
bioactive.en: fiber, protein support, and metabolic ingredients

intro.hr: Kod kontrole težine najvažniji su rutina, unos vlakana i jasna kombinacija glavnog i support proizvoda.
intro.en: For weight balance, routine, fiber intake, and a clear main-plus-support product setup matter most.

bioactive.hr: matična mliječ i nutritivni sastojci za opću svakodnevnu podršku
bioactive.en: royal jelly and supportive nutrients for everyday wellness

intro.hr: Kod ovakvih pitanja ostajemo na općem smjeru svakodnevne podrške i ne ulazimo u procjenu živčanog ili neurološkog stanja.
intro.en: For these questions, stay in a general wellness lane and avoid assessing nerve or neurological conditions.

label.hr: dobitak na kilaži i nutritivna podrška

intro.hr: Kad je cilj dobitak na kilaži ili nutritivna podrška, smisla ima gledati proteinski i hranjivi smjer, a ne programe za kontrolu težine.
intro.en: When the goal is weight gain or nutrition support, it makes more sense to look at a protein and nutrient direction than weight-control programs.

bioactive.hr: biljni sastojci poput kamilice, đumbira i aloe
bioactive.en: botanical ingredients like chamomile, ginger, and aloe

intro.hr: Za osjećaj smirenosti držimo se općih rutina i blagih biljnih sastojaka, bez medicinskih tvrdnji.
intro.en: For calm and balance, stay with general routines and gentle botanicals without medical claims.

bioactive.hr: nutritivni sastojci za ženski balans i svakodnevnu rutinu
bioactive.en: nutrient support for women balance and daily routine

intro.hr: Kod PMS-a i sličnih pitanja držimo se opće nutritivne i rutinske podrške, bez tvrdnji da proizvod rješava bol ili stanje.
intro.en: For PMS-style questions, stay with general nutrient and routine support without presenting products as a solution for pain or a condition.

bioactive.hr: antioksidativni i nutritivni sastojci za svakodnevnu podršku vidu
bioactive.en: antioxidant and nutrient ingredients for daily vision support

intro.hr: Kod pitanja o vidu držimo se opće nutritivne podrške i ne ulazimo u procjenu stanja oka.
intro.en: For vision questions, stay with general nutritional support and avoid assessing eye conditions.

intro.hr: Kad je pitanje vezano uz vitamin D, držimo se opće nutritivne podrške i ne ulazimo u medicinsku procjenu statusa.
intro.en: When the question is about vitamin D, stay with general nutritional support and avoid medical assessment of status.

bioactive.hr: aloe vera, vlakna i sastojci za metaboličku rutinu
bioactive.en: aloe vera, fiber, and ingredients for a metabolic routine

intro.hr: Kod metaboličkih i sličnih pitanja preporuka treba ostati opća, rutinska i oprezna, uz naglasak na sastojke i svakodnevnu strukturu.
intro.en: For metabolic-style questions, recommendations should stay general, routine-based and cautious, with an emphasis on ingredients and daily structure.

bioactive.hr: antioksidativni i nutritivni sastojci za opću dnevnu podršku
bioactive.en: antioxidant and nutrient support ingredients for everyday wellness

intro.hr: Kod ovakvih upita zadržavamo opći pristup svakodnevnoj podršci i preporuku objašnjavamo kroz sastojke i rutinu, bez medicinskih tvrdnji.
intro.en: For these questions, keep the answer in a general wellness lane and explain the direction through ingredients and routine, without medical claims.

bioactive.hr: aloe vera, propolis i sastojci za njegu
bioactive.en: aloe vera, propolis, and care-support ingredients

intro.hr: Kod kože i kose držimo se nježnog, općeg pristupa kroz njegu, sastojke i svakodnevnu rutinu.
intro.en: For skin and hair questions, stay with a gentle, general direction through care, ingredients and everyday routine.
